name: Beer Sausages in Beer Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut cooked sausages into 1/2 inch slices.
2. In a skillet, combine sausage and beer. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Combine brown sugar and cornstarch in a separate bowl.
4. Stir in vinegar, horseradish, and mustard.
5. Add the cornstarch mixture to the sausages.
6. Cook and stir until bubbly.
7. Keep warm and serve with toothpicks.
